R : Type r
S : Type s
inst✝¹ : CommRing R
inst✝ : CommRing S
W : WeierstrassCurve R
f : R →+* S
n : ℕ
⊢ (match n with
    | 0 => 0
    | 1 => 1
    | 2 => 1
    | 3 => (W.map f).Ψ₃
    | 4 => (W.map f).preΨ₄
    | n.succ.succ.succ.succ.succ =>
      let m := n / 2;
      let_fun h4 := ⋯;
      let_fun h3 := ⋯;
      let_fun h2 := ⋯;
      let_fun h1 := ⋯;
      if hn : Even n then
        (preNormEDS' ((W.map f).Ψ₂Sq ^ 2) (W.map f).Ψ₃ (W.map f).preΨ₄ (m + 4) *
              preNormEDS' ((W.map f).Ψ₂Sq ^ 2) (W.map f).Ψ₃ (W.map f).preΨ₄ (m + 2) ^ 3 *
            if Even m then (W.map f).Ψ₂Sq ^ 2 else 1) -
          preNormEDS' ((W.map f).Ψ₂Sq ^ 2) (W.map f).Ψ₃ (W.map f).preΨ₄ (m + 1) *
              preNormEDS' ((W.map f).Ψ₂Sq ^ 2) (W.map f).Ψ₃ (W.map f).preΨ₄ (m + 3) ^ 3 *
            if Even m then 1 else (W.map f).Ψ₂Sq ^ 2
      else
        let_fun h5 := ⋯;
        preNormEDS' ((W.map f).Ψ₂Sq ^ 2) (W.map f).Ψ₃ (W.map f).preΨ₄ (m + 2) ^ 2 *
              preNormEDS' ((W.map f).Ψ₂Sq ^ 2) (W.map f).Ψ₃ (W.map f).preΨ₄ (m + 3) *
            preNormEDS' ((W.map f).Ψ₂Sq ^ 2) (W.map f).Ψ₃ (W.map f).preΨ₄ (m + 5) -
          preNormEDS' ((W.map f).Ψ₂Sq ^ 2) (W.map f).Ψ₃ (W.map f).preΨ₄ (m + 1) *
              preNormEDS' ((W.map f).Ψ₂Sq ^ 2) (W.map f).Ψ₃ (W.map f).preΨ₄ (m + 3) *
            preNormEDS' ((W.map f).Ψ₂Sq ^ 2) (W.map f).Ψ₃ (W.map f).preΨ₄ (m + 4) ^ 2) =
    Polynomial.map f
      (match n with
      | 0 => 0
      | 1 => 1
      | 2 => 1
      | 3 => W.Ψ₃
      | 4 => W.preΨ₄
      | n.succ.succ.succ.succ.succ =>
        let m := n / 2;
        let_fun h4 := ⋯;
        let_fun h3 := ⋯;
        let_fun h2 := ⋯;
        let_fun h1 := ⋯;
        if hn : Even n then
          (preNormEDS' (W.Ψ₂Sq ^ 2) W.Ψ₃ W.preΨ₄ (m + 4) * preNormEDS' (W.Ψ₂Sq ^ 2) W.Ψ₃ W.preΨ₄ (m + 2) ^ 3 *
              if Even m then W.Ψ₂Sq ^ 2 else 1) -
            preNormEDS' (W.Ψ₂Sq ^ 2) W.Ψ₃ W.preΨ₄ (m + 1) * preNormEDS' (W.Ψ₂Sq ^ 2) W.Ψ₃ W.preΨ₄ (m + 3) ^ 3 *
              if Even m then 1 else W.Ψ₂Sq ^ 2
        else
          let_fun h5 := ⋯;
          preNormEDS' (W.Ψ₂Sq ^ 2) W.Ψ₃ W.preΨ₄ (m + 2) ^ 2 * preNormEDS' (W.Ψ₂Sq ^ 2) W.Ψ₃ W.preΨ₄ (m + 3) *
              preNormEDS' (W.Ψ₂Sq ^ 2) W.Ψ₃ W.preΨ₄ (m + 5) -
            preNormEDS' (W.Ψ₂Sq ^ 2) W.Ψ₃ W.preΨ₄ (m + 1) * preNormEDS' (W.Ψ₂Sq ^ 2) W.Ψ₃ W.preΨ₄ (m + 3) *
              preNormEDS' (W.Ψ₂Sq ^ 2) W.Ψ₃ W.preΨ₄ (m + 4) ^ 2)
